 <https://www.anthropic.com/> 


 Hello, 


 We're writing to inform you about some updates to our Privacy Policy 
<https://anthropic.com/privacy>. 


 These changes only affect consumer accounts (Claude Free, Pro, and Max 
plans). If you use Claude Team, Claude Enterprise, the Claude Platform, or 
other services under our Commercial Terms or other agreements, then these 
changes don't apply to you.


What's changing? 


 Claude can do more than ever — taking on bigger tasks and connecting with the 
apps you use. We've updated our Privacy Policy to be clearer about the data we 
collect and how we use it. We encourage you to read the updated Privacy Policy 
in full, but we’ve set out a summary of the key changes below:


1. Multi-step tasks and connected apps. As Claude takes on more multi-step 
tasks and works with third-party apps and services, we've explained the data 
this involves — including how data can flow to and from third parties when you 
connect a service or have Claude do tasks on your behalf.


2. Verification data. As part

74395.subject: SpaceX Goes Public With a Live Crypto Tokenized Stack
74395.body:
**gm, Defiers!**

* **[SpaceX](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/spacex-opens-for-public-trading-friday-with-a-live-crypto-tokenized-equity-stack)**[ opens public trading Friday with full crypto-tokenized stack live](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/spacex-opens-for-public-trading-friday-with-a-live-crypto-tokenized-equity-stack)

* **[Binance bStocks](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/binance-launches-bstocks-tokenized-us-equities-24-7-onchain-trading)**[ puts Nvidia, Tesla, Circle, Micron, Sandisk onchain](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/binance-launches-bstocks-tokenized-us-equities-24-7-onchain-trading)

* **[Citi](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/citi-rolls-out-tokenized-private-company-shares-wealth-institutional-clients)**[ brings tokenized private-company shares to wealth clients](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/citi-rolls-out-tokenized-private-company-shares-wealth-institutional-clients)

* **[Canton Network](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/digital-asset-canton-network-355m-funding-a16z)**[ draws $355M from a16z crypto, HSBC, Apollo, CME, BNP](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/digital-asset-canton-network-355m-funding-a16z)

Tomorrow at 9:30 AM ET, **[SpaceX begins trading on Nasdaq under ticker SPCX](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/spacex-opens-for-public-trading-friday-with-a-live-crypto-tokenized-equity-stack)**. The same morning, multiple crypto venues will have product ready for the same trade: [Ondo lists SPCXon, Kraken's xStocks lists SPCXx, Backpack issues a SPCX token on Solana, and Hyperliquid runs the pre-IPO perpetual](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/spacex-opens-for-public-trading-friday-with-a-live-crypto-tokenized-equity-stack). 

The supporting cluster is just as concrete. [Solana Foundation formalized an institutional market-structure tier](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/solana-foundation-frontier-traders-institutional-program-500m-volume) called Frontier Traders, requiring $500M of trailing 30-day DEX volume for VIP access, and ran the debut campaign on SpaceX tokenized equity. [Binance flipped on its bStocks layer overnight](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/binance-launches-bstocks-tokenized-us-equities-24-7-onchain-trading), putting Nvidia, Tesla, Circle, Micron, and Sandisk on-chain as 24/7 BNB-Chain tokens. [Citi began offering tokenized private-company shares](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/citi-rolls-out-tokenized-private-company-shares-wealth-institutional-clients) to wealth and institutional clients on SIX Digital Exchange. 

This same day, the infrastructure layer targeting this same flow, Digital Asset / Canton Network, [closed a $355 million round led by a16z crypto](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/digital-asset-canton-network-355m-funding-a16z) with HSBC, Apollo, CME, BNP Paribas, and 20+ other institutional names. Tokenized equity stopped being a category we talk about and start

Caption: 

# Thursday links: short sellers, prediction markets, and street smarts

[#FreeAndrewLeft](https://michellecelarier.substack.com/p/how-short-seller-andrew-left-became?has_completed_unsubscribed_unlock=true)

Journalist ==Michelle Celarier offers a populist defense of short sellers, describing them as “the anti-establishment guys of Wall Street, rebels who refuse to buy into the hype all around them.”==

==She then contrasts the accusations against Andrew Left to the known bad behavior of investment banks: “Unlike bankers, Left doesn’t have fiduciary responsibilities to clients and didn’t ====_create _====alleged frauds, promote them and then bet against them.”==

==And yet, a Los Angeles jury found Left guilty on 13 counts of securities fraud — for “manipulating stock market activity and trading opposite to the position he presented to the public,” as the DoJ ==[summed](https://www.justice.gov/usao-cdca/pr/founder-citron-research-found-guilty-scheming-manipulate-stock-market-media-campaigns)== it up.==

==“Can you manipulate the market with the truth?” Left rhetorically asked Celarier.==

==Apparently so. He now faces up to 25 years in prison.==

==As for “trading opposite to the position he presented to the public,” that is the standard business model of activist short selling. They fund their research by taking a quick profit on the initial reaction to its release.==

==We should be happy they do. Celarier notes that more than 50 of the companies Left publicly shorted were subsequently targeted by regulators, “including Chinese frauds, tech scams and others.”==

==His research was exceptionally good. Sherwood News ==[calculated](https://sherwood.news/markets/andrew-left-stock-picks-charges/)== that following the 16 recommendations Left made starting in 2018 would have netted an investor a return of 318% — far in excess of the S&P’s 89% gain. ==

==(Extra impressive as nine of the recommendations were shorts, which can’t return more than 100%.) ==

==In 2015, Left exposed the $40 billion pharmaceutical giant Valeant as a fraud. Valeant was a favorite long among hedge fund managers at the time (many of whom were on social media telling people to buy it).==

==In 2018, he exposed the CEO of Namaste, a cannabis company, for frau

74393.subject: Behind The Wealth Boom Paving Musk's Road To Trillionaire Status
74393.body:
Forbes P.M.

Автор: Forbes


Автор: Forbes

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/behind-wealth-boom-paving-musks-road-trillionaire-status-gjdsc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BdiXQ2QOiT%2B2qzfa%2Fw4v6Yw%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=07MsaDIo1P_cg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mqa0ms9m~s3-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mqa0ms9m-s3
  
Good evening, The making of the world’s first trillionaire has always been inevitable. Since John Jacob Astor arrived in the new nation in the 1780s, likely becoming the first self-made millionaire, the millionaire class has only grown in numbers. However, Elon Musk’s wealth explosion dwarfs the fortunes of other titans throughout history. As he takes SpaceX public Friday in the biggest IPO in history, Musk is poised to break a massive wealth record. Here’s how Musk's road to trillionaire status was paved. The recent slide in Tesla shares has cut more than $50 billion from Musk’s fortune, but he’s still expected to become a trillionaire this week. Thanks for reading! Kris Kornbluth Assistant Editor, Platforms & Curation More Recommended Reads Illustration: Mr.Nelson design Forbes 250: The Most Successful Immigrants In American History We ranked 250 immigrants who best succeeded in achieving their own American Dream during their lifetimes. Samuel Boivin/NurPhoto via Getty Images Claude Traffic Surges As Anthropic Readies Blockbuster IPO Visits to the Claude website in May were up 855.6% year-over-year from the 99.7 million views logged in May 2025.
Приєднатися до обговорення
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/behind-wealth-boom-paving-musks-road-trillionaire-status-gjdsc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BdiXQ2QOiT%2B2qzfa%2Fw4v6Yw%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=07MsaDIo1P_cg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_-null-fz96fz~mqa0ms9m~s3-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mqa0ms9m-s3

Це повідомлення е-поштою адресовано учасникові Oleh Novosadov (I am 36 years old, and I am passionate about the world of cryptocurrencies and blockchain technologies. My professional interests include investing in cryptocurrencies, exploring blockchain, Web3, and the DeFi sector.)

74375.subject: 🇺🇦 Ваш грошовий переказ не було доставлено
74375.body:
PS Ваш переказ не був
доставлений і Paysend здійснив повернення коштів        Вітаємо,
Oleh,

Повідомляємо, що ваш нещодавній переказ не був доставлений.
Платіж було повернено на ваш початковий спосіб оплати. Обробка
повернення коштів банком може зайняти до трьох днів. Деталі
транзакції:

* Номер транзакції: 21429828200

* Сума: 100
EUR

Можливі причини проблем з переказом:

* Неправильні дані одержувача: Переконайтеся, що дані одержувача
правильні
* Потрібна додаткова інформація: Нам може знадобитися більше
інформації від вас для обробки переказу
* Перевищено ліміти: Перевірте, що ви не перевищили ліміти
переказу, встановлені Paysend або банком одержувача
* Тимчасові проблеми: Можливі тимчасові проблеми з банком або
мережею одержувача
* Відмова банком одержувача: Банк одержувача міг відхилити кошти
з власних причин
Рекомендовані дії:

* Перевірте дані вашого одержувача
* Зверніть увагу на повідомлення від Paysend з проханням надати
додаткову інформацію
* Переконайтеся, що ви не перевищили ліміти переказу Paysend
* Перевірте, що у вас стабільне інтернет-з’єднання
* Ознайомтесь з будь-якими повідомленнями про помилки в
інтерфейсі Paysend і дійте згідно з наданими інструкціями
Будь ласка, виконайте наведені вище рекомендовані дії і
повторіть ваш переказ.

ПОВТОРІТЬ ПЕРЕКАЗ
